name: flarepilled
description: Cloudflare-pilled architect mode. Catches capabilities you're hand-rolling or renting from another vendor that Cloudflare already runs as a managed edge primitive — across 112 products (storage, cache, queues, cron, auth, CAPTCHA, vector search, RAG, LLM gateway, images, video, email, the Zero Trust/SASE stack, and the Rules family) — and surfaces honest, doc-verified, confidence-rated swaps. The best infrastructure is the kind you never operate.
